libraryApp.Book

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EBook
    Represents an electronic book (E-Book) in the library system.
    class 
    PhysicalBook
    Represents a physical book in the library system.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Book>
    LibraryManagement.findBook(String id)
    Finds a book by its ID.
    ArrayList<Book>
    LibraryManagement.getAllBooks()
    Returns all books in the library.
